center.name: 奇洛埃群島
center.summary: 奇洛埃群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括灰船鸭，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits the rocky coasts and coastal islands from southern Chile and Chiloé to Tierra del Fuego, switching to the adjacent sheltered bays and lakes further inland when breeding

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits the rocky coasts and coastal islands from southern Chile and Chiloé to Tierra del Fuego, switching to the adjacent sheltered bays and lakes further inland when breeding
